channel.title: DNSSEC on Miscellaneous Notes
channel.description: Recent content in DNSSEC on Miscellaneous Notes

item.title: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Arch Linux
item.description: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Arch Linux Prerequisite stubby dnsmasq Installation stubby sudo pacmas -S stubby Start and endable stubby sudo systemctl enable stubby sudo systemctl start stubby Configuration Open and edit /etc/stubby/stubby.

item.title: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Ubuntu 20.04
item.description: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Ubuntu 20.04 Prerequisite stubby dnsmasq Installation stubby sudo apt install stubby Start and endable stubby sudo systemctl enable stubby sudo systemctl start stubby Configuration Open and edit /etc/stubby/stubby.
